payload.title: Re-attempt rustricted CLI dogfood
payload.description: Once RT-5 (multi-module) lands: add rustricted_attrs::strict!{} to crates/rustricted/src/main.rs, fix the R0042 violations the prior attempt found (build, run_pipeline calls), verify cargo build + tests pass via the wrapper. See case-studies/rustricted-cli-strict-failed.md for the prior writeup.
